testCases.title: GraphQL — Schema introspection accessible
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP __schema] Schema introspection returns full schema. queryType: Query, mutationType: Mutation. Types array includes all domain types. Introspection enabled on QA environment. Per feedback_graphql_introspection.md: always use introspection before writing queries.

testCases.title: GraphQL — Query type fields enumeration
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP __type] Query type fields: cart, me, orders, products, categories, product, category, order, quotes, stores, contacts, organizations. All expected query fields present. Schema matches graphql-schema.md knowledge file.

testCases.title: GraphQL — Mutation type fields enumeration
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP __type] Mutation type fields: addItem, removeCartItem, changeCartItemQuantity, addOrUpdateCartShipment (schema present, runtime fails — BUG-042-001), addCoupon, removeCoupon, createOrderFromCart, updatePersonalData, changePassword, submitQuoteRequest, addOrUpdateCartPayment. All expected mutations present in schema.

testCases.title: GraphQL — Authentication header enforcement
testCases.notes: GraphQL endpoint enforces authentication for protected queries. Bearer JWT in Authorization header required. Unauthenticated queries for cart, me, orders return null data or error. OAuth2 flow per api-auth.md.

testCases.title: GraphQL — Error response format
testCases.notes: GraphQL error response format: { errors: [{ message, locations, path, extensions }] }. Errors array populated on query/mutation failure. extensions.code for error classification. Standard GraphQL error format.

testCases.title: GraphQL — Nullable vs non-null fields
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP __type] Field nullability verified per schema. Required fields (id, name) marked non-null (!). Optional fields nullable. Responses comply with schema nullability constraints.

testCases.title: GraphQL — Input type validation
testCases.notes: GraphQL input type validation enforced server-side. Invalid input (wrong type, missing required field) returns validation error. Input types per schema: AddItemType, ChangeCartItemQuantityType, CartAddressType. Schema-level validation before resolver execution.

testCases.title: GraphQL — GraphiQL UI accessible
testCases.notes: GraphiQL UI accessible at /graphql endpoint in QA environment. Per graphiql-interaction.md: CodeMirror editor, auth headers configurable. Query execution via Run button. Schema explorer available. Introspection-powered autocomplete.

testCases.title: GraphQL — Pagination cursor pattern
testCases.notes: Cursor-based pagination: first, after, last, before. PageInfo: hasNextPage, hasPreviousPage, startCursor, endCursor. Applies to: products, orders, categories. Pagination consistent across all list queries.

testCases.title: GraphQL — storeId parameter required for product queries
testCases.notes: storeId: 'B2B-store' required for products, categories, cart queries. Store-scoped data isolation. Wrong storeId returns different product set. B2B-store is the QA test store identifier.

testCases.title: GraphQL — currencyCode parameter
testCases.notes: currencyCode: 'USD' parameter in price-sensitive queries. All prices returned in USD. formattedAmount uses locale formatting (en-US: $100.00). Currency parameter consistent across cart, product, order queries.

testCases.title: GraphQL — cultureName parameter
testCases.notes: cultureName: 'en-US' parameter for localized content. Product names, descriptions, category names in English. Localized content returned per cultureName. Per feedback_playwright_locale.md: locale must be set.

testCases.title: GraphQL — Subscription type (if available)
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP __schema] Subscription type: not exposed in QA environment (null subscriptionType). Real-time subscriptions not enabled. WebSocket-based GraphQL subscriptions not part of xAPI surface.

testCases.title: GraphQL — Schema deprecations
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP __type] Deprecated fields: isDeprecated=true fields identified. No critical deprecated fields used in active storefront queries. Deprecation warnings tracked for next schema version planning.

testCases.title: GraphQL — Rate limiting behavior
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Rate limiting verification (many rapid queries to /graphql) deferred. Rate limit thresholds not documented. Would require coordinated load generation. Deferred to performance suite (047).

testCases.title: GraphQL — Schema refresh after module update
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Schema refresh (npm run schema:refresh) after module hotfix not tested. No module updates in this session. Schema refresh workflow documented in fast-path failure handling (Step 5 schema_introspection_failed).
